sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_field Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, today()), (2, today());
UPDATE test_dates SET date_field = today() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_field, today() AS current_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT count() AS count_today FROM test_dates WHERE date_field = today();
